taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence Engineer
core_skills: Full-Stack Software Engineering, Typescript, Python, AI coding tools, Startup Mentality
skill_match_scores: Full-Stack Software Engineering:0.0, Typescript:1.0, Python:1.0, AI coding tools:1.0, Startup Mentality:0.0
must_have_quals: Proven experience as a Full-Stack Software Engineer building modern, scalable applications across both the frontend and backend, Typescript + Python is what we use, Hands-on experience and deep comfort using AI coding tools (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, Codex) to augment and accelerate your daily development workflows, An aggressively entrepreneurial spirit with a track record of moving fast, cutting through red tape, and delivering results quickly, A strong desire to be close to the customer, with demonstrated experience running A/B tests, prototypes, or rapid user experiments, The ability to self-direct, pivot rapidly when hypotheses are disproven, and thrive in an unstructured, highly ambiguous environment, A relentless appetite for learning new technologies, taking calculated risks, and having a blast while building the future
core_responsibilities: Design, build, and ship full-stack software solutions with an intense focus on velocity and getting things done, Extensively leverage AI coding assistants and modern tooling to write, test, and deploy code faster and more efficiently than traditional methods, Work on the front lines with end-users to conduct rapid product experiments, gather real-world feedback, and iterate quickly based on data, Operate comfortably in a fast-paced environment with a high degree of ambiguity, taking extreme ownership of your projects from inception to launch, Build entirely new, AI-native products from scratch while also identifying ways to accelerate existing Intuit products with cutting-edge tech
job_summary: Intuit is a forward-thinking company focused on building disruptive products and enhancing its ecosystem with AI technologies. They are seeking a Full-Stack Software Engineer to rapidly develop and execute software solutions, leverage AI tools, and engage in customer-centric experimentation to drive innovation.
